title: cremanthodium plantagineum f. ellisii
intro: Cremanthodium plantagineum f. ellisii, also known as a rare alpine species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, is a variant of the cremanthodium plantagineum plant. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, and it has been used to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
